content:
Deploy  live too and show proof and evidence  too IVX CHAT ROOM SENIOR DEVELOPER AUDIT + EXECUTE + DEPLOY

Repository:
ibb142/rork-ivxholding--1

MISSION:
Audit the IVX chat room end to end, upgrade it using the same senior-level techniques Rork uses, execute the fixes, deploy to production, and return real evidence.

No narrative.
No placeholders.
No fake VERIFIED.
Think → analyze → execute → test → deploy → prove.

1. AUDIT CHAT ROOM

Review:
- expo/app/ivx/chat.tsx
- chat service files
- Owner AI runtime
- watchdog logs
- sendMessageMutation
- send_and_ai branch
- localFirstChatMode
- command prefix routing
- elevated confirmation early-return
- Supabase conversation/message persistence
- API routes for chat
- production chat endpoint

Return:
CHAT_FILES_FOUND:
CHAT_ROUTES_FOUND:
CURRENT_FAILURES:
ROOT_CAUSE:

2. FIX AI_TRIGGER_DECISION TIMEOUT

Known failure:
- SEND_TAP passes
- USER_ROW_INSERTED passes
- AI_TRIGGER_DECISION times out
- send_and_ai branch does not run

Fix:
- remove false early-return
- ensure AI branch always runs after user message insert
- add timeout guard
- add retry once
- add visible error if AI fails
- preserve message history
- prevent duplicate messages
- auto-open last conversation
- scroll to newest message

3. SENIOR TECHNIQUES TO ADD

Add:
- trace IDs per message
- checkpoint logging
- structured error object
- retry policy
- watchdog evidence
- request/response timing
- backend fallback if frontend AI route fails
- idempotent message save
- stable message IDs
- conversation reload verification
- production smoke test

4. TESTS

Run:
- typecheck
- lint
- chat unit tests
- chat integration tests
- send message test
- AI reply test
- reload persistence test
- watchdog checkpoint test

Return:
TYPECHECK:
LINT:
TESTS:
FAILED_TESTS:
FIXES_APPLIED:

5. DEPLOY

Deploy latest working code.

Return:
GITHUB_SHA:
COMMIT_URL:
RENDER_DEPLOY_ID:
RENDER_DEPLOYED_SHA:
HEALTH_SHA:
VERSION_SHA:
COMMIT_MATCH:

6. PRODUCTION PROOF

Test live:
- chat.ivxholding.com loads
- Owner AI chat opens
- last conversation auto-opens
- message sends
- AI replies
- message persists after refresh
- watchdog reaches UI_UPDATED
- no AI_TRIGGER_DECISION timeout
- no TypeError network error
- no false “could not read response”

Return:
CHAT_FRONTEND:
CHAT_API:
MESSAGE_SEND:
AI_REPLY:
MESSAGE_SAVE:
MESSAGE_LOAD:
LAST_CONVERSATION:
WATCHDOG_TRACE:
ERRORS:

7. FINAL OUTPUT ONLY

REPO:
BRANCH:
GITHUB_SHA:
RENDER_DEPLOY_ID:
COMMIT_MATCH:
CHAT_STATUS:
AI_TRIGGER_DECISION:
WATCHDOG_STATUS:
MESSAGE_PERSISTENCE:
LAST_CONVERSATION_AUTO_OPEN:
ERRORS:
BLOCKERS:
FINAL_STATUS:

Allowed FINAL_STATUS:
VERIFIED
FAILED
BLOCKED
UNVERIFIED

VERIFIED only if live production chat passes end to end with real evidence.
